recommendations.title: The Emperor's New Groove
recommendations.overview: Emperor Kuzco is turned into a llama by his ex-administrator Yzma, and must now regain his throne and his human form with the help of Pacha, a gentle llama herder.

recommendations.title: Cats Don't Dance
recommendations.overview: An ambitious singing and dancing cat in 1939 Hollywood overcomes several obstacles to fulfill his dream of becoming a movie star.

recommendations.genres: Family, Animation, Action, Comedy, Science Fiction, TV Movie, Adventure

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

recommendations.title: Fireheart
recommendations.overview: The film explores the world of firefighters in 1920s New York City and tells the story of a 16-year-old girl who will have to become a hero in order to save her city.
recommendations.director: Laurent Zeitoun, Theodore Anthony Lee Ty

recommendations.title: Los Verduleros
recommendations.overview: The adventures of two friends, one a chicken vendor in a market and the other a policeman. They have love affairs and capture criminals.
